category_sources: Official Nmap Ncrack page describes the tool as network authentication cracking software.
source_facts.description says Network authentication cracking tool.
display_name_sources: Official Nmap documentation uses the capitalized project name Ncrack.
docs_sources: Official Nmap Ncrack Reference Guide is the dedicated manual page.
source_facts.homepage is the official Ncrack project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/nmap/ncrack, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Ncrack manual documents command-line use against network services.
